title: cryptogramma brunoniana subsp. raddeana
intro: Cryptogramma brunoniana subsp. raddeana, also known as the Alpine Rockcap, is a species of fern native to the mountainous regions of China and the Himalayas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cryptogramma brunoniana subsp. raddeana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared as a tea or decoction, or used in combination with other herbs, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
